active_parents.title: Studio Workbench Foundation
active_parents.current_workstream: Workbench shell completion, default-shell cutover, and Media Studio unification
active_parents.next_action: Execute Workbench default-shell cutover, Media Studio unification, and Ops Jobs tab UI work from completed checklists.
active_parents.blocker: No hard blocker. Remaining work is implementation planning and sequencing for default-shell cutover and Media Studio unification.
completed_scope: Frozen seven-domain Workbench foundation implemented and browser-proven.
Workspace contracts declared for top-level domains.
Media Studio is prompt-first in Workbench.
Workbench Plan mode reads registry/task/run/proof mirror data.
Workbench registers as workbench.foundation Shay context provider and passed actual UI proof.

active_parents.title: Plan, Task, Run, and Capture Intelligence
active_parents.current_workstream: Plan/task/run/proof ledgers, status mirrors, and capture promotion
active_parents.next_action: Implement automatic status-packet regeneration, capture-packet promotion, and Ops read/freshness substrate.
active_parents.blocker: No hard blocker. Ledger substrate and first capture pass exist; automation and promotion rules remain to be specified before implementation.
completed_scope: Four-parent registry, task ledger, run ledger, and proof ledger are populated.
fam-hub plan review, task promote, and run start exist.
FAMTASTIC-STATUS.md and Workbench plan-state mirror exist as manual status packets.
fam-hub capture extract creates review-only capture packets.

active_parents.title: Build Intent, Fulfillment Trace, and Workflow Data
active_parents.next_action: Implement pipeline visualizer stage/event matching and missing-stage detection from the completed phase-two checklist.
active_parents.blocker: No hard blocker. Phase 1 catalog and visualizer are complete; deeper trace semantics need action-item definition before implementation.
completed_scope: parallelBuild emits durable trace stage events.
Workbench pipeline visualizer phase 1 renders inspect, trace, and propose lanes.
Three site workflow modes are documented.

active_parents.title: MBSH Reunion Site Execution
active_parents.current_workstream: Blocked live deploy proof plus media/story readiness
active_parents.next_action: Wait on MBSH deploy access/config and story media/rights inputs; execute live proof and media completion after blockers clear.
active_parents.blocker: Live deploy proof is blocked by external Netlify/DNS/GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL/Resend/backend config access. Media/story completion is blocked by seven missing story images and missing rights proof.
completed_scope: Site-scoped task records and deploy repo boundary are documented.
RSVP and sponsor frontend flows are browser-verified and fixed where needed.
Content deltas, Studio reproduction harness, and generalized platform gaps are documented.

P0.title: Finish MBSH deploy proof
P0.next_action: Provision Netlify/DNS/GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL/Resend access and production API_BASE_URL, then run production smoke tests and rollback verification.

P0.title: Collect MBSH deploy access/config
P0.next_action: Fill the access/config handoff checklist with Netlify, DNS, GoDaddy/PHP/MySQL, Resend, backend secret path, and production API_BASE_URL details.

P1.title: Complete MBSH media/story assets
P1.next_action: Add or generate the seven missing story/timeline image files and produce rights/approval manifest for archival or crowd-sourced gallery assets.

P1.title: Implement automatic status-packet regeneration
P1.next_action: Build `fam-hub plan export-status` to regenerate FAMTASTIC-STATUS.md and site-studio/public/data/workbench-plan-state.json from registry/task/run/proof ledgers.

P1.title: Implement capture-packet promotion dry-run/apply flow
P1.next_action: Add review-safe capture promotion with dry-run diff, destination mapping, duplicate checks, apply mode, and proof records.

P1.title: Prepare Workbench default-shell cutover patch
P1.next_action: Patch Studio so Workbench can become the default shell behind a reversible route/flag while keeping legacy shell fallback and Shay context proof.

P1.title: Prepare Media Studio unification patch
P1.next_action: Unify Workbench and production Media Studio object/control model without triggering paid generation calls.

P1.title: Implement pipeline visualizer stage matching
P1.next_action: Compare workflow catalog stages against trace events and surface observed/missing/partial/extra status in Workbench.

P1.title: Produce MBSH story media assets and rights manifest
P1.next_action: Resolve the seven missing story image paths with approved archival/crowd-sourced assets or clearly labeled generated substitutes, then browser-verify story/gallery pages.

P1.title: Implement Ops read model and freshness substrate
P1.next_action: Define/read normalized Ops records from existing ledgers with freshness values before adding command mutations.

P1.title: Define Ops command and stream boundaries after read model
P1.next_action: After read/freshness proof, define command endpoint and /ws/ops stream boundaries for approve, park, cancel, promote, archive, and purge operations.

P1.title: Build Ops Jobs tab MVP shell
P1.next_action: Build the Workbench Ops Jobs tab shell with six lanes, Stale Debt drawer, inspector, and record-type visual tokens after read/freshness data is available.

current_run.current_step: Remaining plan-shaped asks are actionized. The Ops Workspace GUI proposed packet was corrected out of active parents and split into existing-parent tasks. Open work is now eight ready implementation tasks plus four blocked MBSH deploy/media tasks.
current_run.report_back: Report after each committed checkpoint and continue into the next ready P0 task.
current_run.source: User instructed to auto approve everything and complete remaining consolidated work.

proposed_records.note: Ops Workspace GUI is design-only and should be actionized into tasks before any fifth active parent is introduced.
